root_cause_summary: The documentation did not clearly distinguish event timestamp from ingestion time for invoice-period attribution.
root_cause_details: Support confirmed that the customer followed the API reference but interpreted timestamp as ingestion time because the article did not explain invoice-period attribution clearly.
resolution_summary: Clarified the behavior for the customer and proposed a documentation update.
resolution_steps: Compared the customer interpretation with the usage ingestion documentation.
Confirmed the current behavior depends on the event timestamp.
verification_steps: Verify the affected source describes timestamp behavior.
Verify the proposed clarification explains invoice-period attribution.
verification_results: The proposed clarification covers invoice-period attribution.
